content: Dexie.js official docs recommend: (1) subclass Dexie with TypeScript EntityTable for type safety, (2) export a singleton db instance from db.ts, (3) use useLiveQuery() in components for reactive reads. For write operations, call db.table.add/put/delete directly from event handlers or thin service functions. The decoupling pattern passes query functions as callbacks to components. No formal repository pattern is prescribed; a thin services layer (db.wordForms.add etc.) is the idiomatic middle ground that avoids coupling UI to raw Dexie APIs while avoiding ORM overhead.
